About
Me

I'm a junior graphic and digital designer based in Sydney, Australia, with a growing foundation in motion graphics and a passion for creating work that is considered, purposeful, and visually engaging.

I enjoy working across brand identity, digital design, and motion — bringing ideas to life through thoughtful visuals that communicate clearly and leave a lasting impression.

Currently building my practice and open to opportunities, collaborations, and projects that push my skills forward.

Skills

  • Adobe Photoshop
  • Adobe InDesign
  • Adobe Illustrator
  • Adobe After Effects
  • Adobe Premiere Pro
  • Figma
  • Canva
